problem id: b3ce071c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  11111001 -> 11111111
  11010101 -> 00011010
  01100001 -> 10111100
  00111001 -> 01101111
  10001110 -> 11011001
  00110101 -> 01000111
  11010001 -> 00011010
  11101010 -> 10011101

query: 10000001
predicted answer: 11111011
